title: psydrax schimperianus subsp. schimperianus
intro: Psydrax schimperianus subsp. schimperianus, also known as the West African shrub, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever and various infections, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Psydrax schimperianus subsp. schimperianus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
